name: William S. Fischer
abstract: William S. Fischer (March 5, 1935 – May 22, 2023) was an American keyboardist, saxophonist, arranger and composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Junior Mance Part I
about_quotes.evidence: Bill Fischer, who is an arranger around town... he did like just some simple charts and outlines... And he had to keep telling me... every time they had to do another take it was my fault.
about_quotes.doc_title: Junior Mance Part I interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, New York City, New York, July 27, 1995 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Joel Dorn
about_quotes.evidence: Then I had been working with a young arranger named Bill Fischer and I had met him, Joe Zawinul introduced me to him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joel Dorn interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2007

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...the arranger is Bill Fischer. >> [INTERVIEWEE] That’s it, Bill Fischer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
